/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/my_robot_interfaces/msg/detail/pose_command__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/suvi/poc_arm/build/my_robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
